criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users in app stores (e.g., Google Play Store, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: The total number of times the app has been downloaded.

criteria.name: AI Implementation Quality
criteria.description: Subjective assessment of how well AI is integrated and used within the app to enhance the user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert reviews, app descriptions

criteria.name: Uniqueness of Entertainment
criteria.description: The degree to which the app offers novel or distinct entertainment experiences compared to other apps.

criteria.name: User Reviews Sentiment
criteria.description: Analysis of user reviews to determine the overall sentiment (positive, negative, neutral) regarding the app's entertainment value and AI features.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store
